campaign.name: UAE distributor outreach
campaign.template: Hi {{first_name}}, I noticed {{company_name}} works in {{lead_context}}. We manufacture {{value_prop}}. Would it make sense to send a short catalogue? Best, {{sender_name}}

business_profile.summary: Acme Rubber Works provides custom rubber products. Rubber products manufacturer for OEMs and industrial distributors
value_propositions: custom rubber products for industrial buyers
direct manufacturer supply with consistent quality

drafts.subject: Potential supply fit for Gulf Industrial Supplies
drafts.body:
Hi Ahmed, I noticed Gulf Industrial Supplies works in industrial maintenance supplies in Dubai. We manufacture custom rubber products for industrial buyers. Would it make sense to send a short catalogue? Best, Maya

If this is not relevant, reply 'not relevant' and I will not contact you again.
drafts.personalization_reason: Personalized using title 'Procurement Manager', company 'Gulf Industrial Supplies', and context 'industrial maintenance supplies in Dubai'.
